units.content: decomposition of inference-step dependency graph into strongly-connected components prior to marker propagation
condensation graph formed by contracting each strongly-connected component to a single node, yielding a directed acyclic graph
markers propagated on the condensation graph rather than directly on the original inference-step dependency graph
internal dynamics of each strongly-connected component containing more than one node routed to a fixed-point solver
fixed-point solver computes performatively-stable states on each multi-node component under predetermined contraction conditions
